For 401(k) accounts, account information aggregate
INV401KBAL - Static variable in interface model.ofx.OfxTags
For 401(k) accounts, account balance aggregate
INV401KSOURCE - Static variable in interface model.ofx.OfxTags
Must be one of the following: PRETAX, AFTERTAX, MATCH, PROFITSHARING, ROLLOVER, OTHERVEST, OTHERNONVEST

Indicates whether the ledger is balanced (total debits equal total credits).

Indicates whether the ledger is balanced, based on the most recent trial balance result.
